reach_why: Extends continual-learning critiques, but does not clearly open wholly unprecedented explanatory territory.
novelty_why: Non-obviously links concept drift, accidental retention, rehearsal bias, and opaque truths under one epistemic frame.
falsifiable_why: Parts are testable in dynamic benchmarks; opaque-premise effects remain underspecified and weakly operationalized.
explanation: Past performance can mislead when tasks mutate, memory is ambiguous, and preserving old biases may hinder needed revision.
